coach_notes: For the Barista, Front Desk Agent, and Bartender roles, the missing skills like graphic design, Adobe Creative Suite, and visual merchandising are not critical, as these jobs focus on customer service, cash handling, and point-of-sale operations. Instead, prioritize enhancing your resume with specific examples of fast-paced environment experience and customer order accuracy to align with these positions. Consider adding certifications in hospitality or customer service to strengthen your application for these specific jobs.

jobs.title: FT Front Desk Agent-DoubleTree by Hilton Weekly pay
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your hospitality, communication, and workplace skills directly match front desk duties. Experience with high-quality service and community outreach is a plus.
jobs.gaps: No specific hotel front desk experience mentioned; may need to learn property management software.

jobs.title: Shift Leader
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your career readiness, teamwork, and communication skills align with shift leader responsibilities. Experience in fast-paced environments and event operations is relevant.
jobs.gaps: No direct supervisory or leadership experience listed; may need to develop team management and conflict resolution skills.

jobs.title: Barista - Temporary
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your hospitality and teamwork skills are relevant for a barista role, and you have experience in fast-paced environments.
jobs.gaps: No direct barista or coffee-making experience listed; SpaceX may require technical or aerospace background, and the temporary nature may not align with your career readiness focus.

jobs.title: Bartender - Part Time
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your hospitality, teamwork, and fast-paced environment experience are relevant. Bartending can build on your event operations skills.
jobs.gaps: No bartending or alcohol service experience listed; may need to learn drink recipes and responsible service practices.

jobs.title: Morning Line/Prep Cook
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your cleanup and standards skills are directly applicable. Experience in fast-paced environments and teamwork supports kitchen work.
jobs.gaps: No specific cooking or prep cook experience; may need to learn kitchen safety and food preparation techniques.
